author: @maguccimotorincorporation
text: I continue to create a project of an internal non-combustion engine, I remind you that I am posting here on my channel the technology and the principle of operation, according to which anyone can create a prototype and enjoy free energy, since I am denied financial support at the stage of the idea and theoretical research, after a year of unsuccessful searches. Including I will begin to assemble a sample. And soon another video will be released revealing my developments, the wind of change is coming! All those who are not indifferent, welcome to fly into this departing innovative car, which will lead to great achievements for the successful future of the planet and humanity!

author: @mijaronomuro8190
text: Please show IN PRACTICE the production of hydrogen from sunlight reacting with g-C3N4 (Graphitic Carbon Nitride)!! Nobody did this on YouTube!!!

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I thought I did this years ago mate

replies.author: @mijaronomuro8190
replies.text:
@ThinkingandTinkering 
I only found two videos showing how to produce the g-C3N4. Have you done any demonstration of the material producing hydrogen in sunlight? If you can, show me the demonstration video, please. Sorry for my lack of knowledge.  I want to say that your channel is the BEST SCIENTIFIC CHANNEL on YouTube. Thank you very much for giving us years of scientific knowledge. I learn a lot from you.

author: @yourworkshopmate372
text: Interesting video thank you but on a different topic. Could you please do a video on how much energy could be saved using momentum of a fly wheel, using a one direction bearing like a bicycle but the fly wheel has magnets passing copper coils and saving  that energy in capacitors as capacitors are fast charging. How much of that energy could be saved in the capacitors,  and how much of that energy in the capacitors will you be able to used to drive the fly wheel. Obviously  driving the wheel intermittently then stopping and allowing the momentum to charge the capacitors.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I have done lots of stuff on flywheels mate - but essentially the energy saved is going to be the energy put in less losses in the system

author: @EricFranklin-d2v
text:
Fun! Love the bearing roller spacer ring.

Slightly off topic question: I saw a belt driven linear extending actuator made by rise robotics that claims to be the most powerful robotic arm in the world, and it replaces hydraulics. Have you done a video exploring how something like that would work?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: To be hnest mate - i thought that bit was pretty neat lol

replies.author: @EricFranklin-d2v
replies.text:
​​@ThinkingandTinkering Slightly off topic question: I saw a belt driven linear extending actuator made by rise robotics that claims to be the most powerful robotic arm in the world, and it replaces hydraulics. Have you done a video exploring how something like that would work?
Perhaps with gt2 belts? Or this format, perhaps no stretch cord?

author: @philhooper4196
text: I have an idea for a generator and I cant find another like it. I run it through chatgpt, and says it would be good for wind energy due to the self-propulsion from the magnetic field setup.  wanted to share with the channel.  Wanted to see if anyone was interested?  Uses Flux compression and decompression and a different type of coil than usual for the generator. Also generate a high voltage due to constant and rapid  flux

replies.author: @JanielMcGuitarAndTea
replies.text: Be careful, I had an idea stolen a few years back.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: If you want to share it mate - do a video

replies.author: @philhooper4196
replies.text: @ThinkingandTinkering I really havent made it it yet, just in progress.  Im on a limited budget, I kinda want to reach out to you, but its hard to reach content creators because they setup firewalls so they don't get flooded with emails.  I watch your show all the time, I do have some electronics background, but a little weak when it comes to motors/gen.  My only advisor is chatgpt, but sometime I think its lying to me, or just making things up. I was just hoping to get your take or input since you are my only generator creator I watch.

author: @rommelfcc
text:
Very nice lots of parts 🤔 
If reduction is what you want, why not try a cyclone reduction gearbox?
Hmm you can mess with the 3-D model CAD files or whatever software your happy using…
And make the cams larger and inner gears bigger and simpler for less reduction  anyways have fun 🎉🎉🎉

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: It's difficult to know what you mean by that mate - Cyclone is a gearbox manufacturer who make all kinds of gear boxes = but cycloidal drives also go by the name of cyclone gearboxes - either way I have done videos on them already
